results.title: Court sets aside order denying FIR against Rahul Gandhi for describing Ram as ‘mythological’
results.description: The Varanasi special court ordered the magistrate to hear the matter again based on decisions by the Supreme Court and the High Court.

results.title: HCL and NTPC Explore Strategic Alliance for Mining and Resource Security
results.description: Hindustan Copper Ltd (HCL) CMD Sanjiv Kumar Singh met with NTPC leadership to discuss institutional collaborations in sustainable mining, copper production, and resource security.

results.title: NEET-UG 2026: PIB debunks viral re-exam notice, warns students against misinformation
results.description: PIB Fact Check: PIB has dismissed a viral NEET-UG 2026 re-exam notice as fake and urged candidates to rely only on official NTA updates. The warning comes ahead of the June 21 test, as rumours and misleading claims continue circulating online.

results.title: Comparing Nehru and Modi illogical; BJP must say why joblessness, inflation still unresolved: Congress
results.description: Rathore said, "Instead of celebrating 12 years of Modi, the BJP should explain why his government failed to resolve the issues of farmers, inflation and unemployment".
